case_title: SINCHRONY BANK VS. FRANCIS JIMENEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62717504)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, FRANCIS AKA FRANCIS A. JUMENEZ DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-05-2018
